name: WhaleOps
description: Commercial DataOps platform built on Apache DolphinScheduler and Apache SeaTunnel by the creators team.

seo.title: WhaleOps — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: WhaleOps: Commercial DataOps platform built on Apache DolphinScheduler and Apache SeaTunnel by the creators team.

when_to_use: Commercial DataOps platform on DolphinScheduler and SeaTunnel
Enterprise-supported data orchestration from the OSS creators
End-to-end data pipeline scheduling with managed SLA
Combining workflow orchestration and CDC integration in one tool
Managed service for teams self-hosting DolphinScheduler or SeaTunnel

pros: Built by DolphinScheduler and SeaTunnel creators
Combines orchestration and data integration in one
cons: Limited presence outside China and APAC
Community smaller than Airflow or Dagster
Enterprise support maturity varies by region
review.verdict: Attractive if you already run DolphinScheduler or SeaTunnel; otherwise Airflow/Dagster ecosystems still win globally.
review.best_for: APAC data teams wanting commercial support for DolphinScheduler and SeaTunnel
review.not_for: Western companies standardized on Airflow, Dagster, or Prefect
